overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The scene features overcast skies, industrial architecture, digital billboards, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with security guardhouse

events.description: turning right from intersection onto sidewalk past guardhouse
green military-style vehicle passes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians on the corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shorts and cap standing on street corner
two pedestrians conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: beige security building with red roof trim and black metal fencing
tall gray pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
distant massive industrial complex with smokestacks and towering structures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at an urban intersection with a small guardhouse building on the corner. The camera follows a character turning onto the sidewalk, passing pedestrians standing near the crosswalk. A green vehicle drives past on the road as the character walks along the concrete sidewalk with the industrial skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved roadside with industrial district overlook

events.description: character briefly runs to catch up with a child walking ahead
a woman with a red hat joins and walks alongside the character

agents.ego_description: walking along curved sidewalk with industrial backdrop, accompanied by a child and a woman with red headgear

notable_agents.action: small child in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
woman wearing red hat and gray tactical vest walking alongside ego

entered.detail: abandoned car wreck on the roadside
elevated highway structure with visible damage and decay

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved road with expansive views of the industrial district in the background. The character is joined by a child and a woman with a red hat. The sidewalk runs alongside a road with occasional vehicles passing by, and derelict structures are visible in the distance.

events.description: waiting for traffic then stepping onto crosswalk to cross the street
crossing the street and entering the area with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating across the intersection, avoiding vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian in green shirt and shorts crossing the street

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying political campaign advertisement with portrait
tall cylindrical water tower with rust patches and number 06 marking
large curved digital screen structure displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection with moderate vehicle traffic. Large billboards become prominent, including a political advertisement and a massive circular digital screen. The rusted water tower stands as a landmark on the right side as the character navigates through scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with digital advertising

events.description: continuing straight along the wide pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along wide pedestrian promenade lined with palm trees and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown trench coat walking ahead on the path
pedestrian in green shirt walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: line of tall palm trees lining the center of the walkway
green painted metal fence running along the right edge of the path
cluster of large digital billboards on building facade showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian promenade featuring rows of palm trees and extensive digital advertising displays. The path is bordered by a green metal railing on one side and a busy street on the other. Other pedestrians walk in both directions along this wide tiled walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually transitions into a high-tech urban promenade. It begins at a city intersection by a small guardhouse, following a character as they pass pedestrians and a green vehicle while moving toward a distant industrial skyline. As the path curves, the view expands to reveal derelict structures in the background while the character is joined by a woman in a red hat and a child. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection where the environment becomes more cluttered with moderate traffic, a rusted water tower, and massive circular digital billboards. Finally, the camera ascends onto an elevated pedestrian promenade, moving past rows of palm trees and extensive advertising displays along a wide tiled walkway bordered by a green metal railing.
